subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference! We'd love to get something on the calendar.

Here are some slots available next week:

  • Tuesday, April 21 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, April 22 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, April 23 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Any of those work for a 30-minute call? Just let us know your preference and we'll send over an invite.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal personnel information or direct phone numbers. For reaching the right people at a senior level, our public website has the appropriate contact channels to get you connected.

Thanks, and looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Company Team
